action: Bind cryptographically verified signer fingerprints to exact repository, workflow, ref, and claim-class authorization scope.

progress.finding: Signature validity and distinct-key threshold satisfaction do not authorize a signer for a particular evidence class. Authorization must be explicit and exact-scope.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical source and test content

handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel evidence acceptance should invoke signer authorization only after DSSE verification and distinct-key threshold evaluation, using real authorized fingerprints loaded from protected configuration rather than repository test fixtures.
next_action: Integrate the policy into verified-evidence-acceptance and add certificate or OIDC-derived identity binding so repository, workflow, and ref cannot be supplied only by an untrusted caller.
